sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n88590" key="prosanarripi/zw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προσανα-ρρῑπίζω</orth>, <sense id="n88590.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">fan</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">blow up besides</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">πόθον</foreign> ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0018.tlg001:442" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">442</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
